name: engage-by-capstone
description: Engage by Capstone - Professional proposal generation for UK accountants

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint && cd ../shared && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npm run typecheck && cd ../shared && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:e2e: cd e2e-tests && npm ci && npx playwright test
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build

author: Capstone
